title: Indeed Scraper Pro — Input
description: Provide a search (position + location + country) or a list of Indeed start URLs. Both can be combined.

position.title: Position / keywords
position.description: Job title or keywords (e.g. 'senior react developer').

country.title: Country
country.description: ISO country code; routes to the matching Indeed domain (US → indeed.com, GB → uk.indeed.com, …).

maxItemsPerSearch.title: Max items per search
maxItemsPerSearch.description: Hard cap on results returned per search/start URL. Indeed itself usually caps at ~1,000 — split by location or date if you need more.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Indeed search, category, or company-jobs URLs (e.g. https://www.indeed.com/cmp/Google/jobs).

parseCompanyDetails.title: Enrich with company details
parseCompanyDetails.description: Visit each company page once per run to collect rating, reviews count, HQ, size and industry. Charged separately.

fetchFullDescription.title: Fetch full job description
fetchFullDescription.description: Hit the detail page to get the full HTML description, requirements and external apply link. Disable to keep scrapes fast and cheap when list-page data is enough.

saveOnlyUniqueItems.title: Deduplicate across runs
saveOnlyUniqueItems.description: Skip listings already saved in previous runs (uses a per-Actor key-value store keyed on Indeed job ID).

followApplyRedirects.title: Resolve external apply links
followApplyRedirects.description: Follow redirects on 'Apply on company site' to capture the final URL. Adds latency.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy is recommended; residential is required for high volume.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Parallel browser pages. Higher = faster + more proxy spend + higher block risk.

debug.title: Debug mode
debug.description: Verbose logs and per-page snapshots saved to the key-value store.
